content: Jackbox UX patterns: 4-5 letter room code displayed prominently on main screen, players visit jackbox.tv and enter code + name. QR code scanning added in Pack 9 as streamlined alternative. WebSocket-based connection maintained. Phone controller UI: limited component set (draw, buttons, text input). Large friendly buttons, optimized drawing canvas, clear typography. Studio hired dedicated phone UX advocate. Design philosophy: do fewer things excellently rather than replicating full gamepad. The four-letter code is temporary/single-use per session.
